title: elaphoglossum oxyglossum
intro: Elaphoglossum oxyglossum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the Elaphoglossum fern. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum oxyglossum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and infections. Elaphoglossum oxyglossum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, with some traditional preparations involving the use of the plant's leaves and stems in a hot water extract.
